category_sources: Official Nagios documentation describes Nagios Core monitoring critical IT infrastructure components, network protocols, applications, services, and servers.
source_facts.description says network monitoring and management system.
display_name_sources: Official repository is NagiosEnterprises/nagioscore and official docs section names the product Nagios Core.
docs_sources: Official Nagios Core 4 documentation is hosted under assets.nagios.com/downloads/nagioscore/docs.
Official Nagios documentation index links Nagios Core manuals, quick start guide, and FAQs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/NagiosEnterprises/nagioscore; per instruction, not second-guessed.
